title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #17 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The collar and cuffs are already gone!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look!! I found the keys and everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oh, good work... but it's fine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: that old man did something weird again....!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Luffy, what kind of guy is he?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you withstood that so easily,

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Then you guys aren't lightweights either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Release the Roswald Family at once!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world: key exchange.
